title: Hide [not a dweller]
description: Adds an entity that doesn't mind playing...
body:
# Without **Gekcolib** this mod does not work!  download it.

                          
(THIS IS NOT A COPY OF The Watching Shade!)

Play or die...
Win it and you won't get hurt...
It will play with you... Be careful

Commands if you want to play (in 1.0.5 it will be by itself): /player_hide , /player_seek , /tag_game_no_tagger , /tag_game_tagger ...
down ↓



![IT IS HERE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ae537d6c9527a684adf08668d8a958fa8396fc9.png)




HOW to play?
-- Hide and Seek: the player hides - a 10-second countdown will start, during this time you need to hide or you know what will happen (death) you need to avoid being seen by him and after 60 seconds he will leave and you will receive a reward.

-- Hide and Seek: Player seek - A 10 second countdown will begin during which you need to prepare to search for IT. After the timer runs out, you will have 30 seconds to find IT, there will be 3 rounds and in the 3rd you are given 25 seconds, which will be a little more difficult. When you find it 3 times, you will receive a reward, if you do not have time then...

-- Tag game: Player not a tagger - In this game, IT will write to you that he wants to play a game - tag, in which you need to catch up or run away from each other. In this version of the game, you need to run away from IT, you have 80 seconds to do this, after which he will disappear and give a reward. I also do not advise going into the water during this game ... 

-- Tag game: Player tagger is the game I mentioned above, but in this version you need to catch up with  IT in 40 seconds. But since he is stupid, it will be very easy to do this, after which he will give you a reward, but if you somehow did not catch up with him, then I already mentioned what will happen.


Also in this mod there are a lot of different things that are either not finished yet or made as a joke. Well, I suggest you study everything else yourself!



































it
